category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to South Korea) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-South Korea Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入韩国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入韓國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against South Korean requirements: KC Safety Certification (안전인증) under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, KC 62133 cell safety, KC-EMC marking via RRA, UN 38.3 transport, KATS/KC market access, K-REACH, and energy efficiency obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与韩国要求对照：依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》的KC安全认证（안전인증）、KC 62133电芯安全、经RRA的KC-EMC标志、UN 38.3运输、KATS/KC市场准入、K-REACH及能效义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與韓國要求對照：依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》的KC安全認證（안전인증）、KC 62133電芯安全、經RRA的KC-EMC標誌、UN 38.3運輸、KATS/KC市場准入、K-REACH及能效義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters must obtain KC Safety Certification (안전인증) under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act with KC 62133 testing by a KATS-designated lab (KTC / KTL / KTR), KC-EMC registration via RRA where electronics are present, and a valid UN 38.3 transport report — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口商须依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》取得KC安全认证（안전인증），由KATS指定实验室（KTC/KTL/KTR）完成KC 62133检测，含电子元件时还须经RRA完成KC-EMC登记，并持有有效的UN 38.3运输报告——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商須依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》取得KC安全認證（안전인증），由KATS指定實驗室（KTC/KTL/KTR）完成KC 62133檢測，含電子元件時還須經RRA完成KC-EMC登記，並持有有效的UN 38.3運輸報告——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, designated certification body, or primary legal source preferred. Official URLs from kats.go.kr, motie.go.kr, safetykorea.kr, rra.go.kr, law.go.kr, unece.org, or equivalent authority sources only. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Does China's GB 31241 meet South Korean requirements for lithium battery safety?
q.zh: 中国GB 31241是否满足韩国锂电池安全要求？
q.zht: 中國GB 31241是否滿足韓國鋰電池安全要求？

a.en: No. South Korea requires KC Safety Certification (안전인증) for lithium secondary cells and battery packs under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, with testing to KC 62133 (aligned with IEC 62133) by a KATS-designated body such as KTC, KTL, or KTR. A GB 31241 test report alone is not sufficient for the Korean market, and the KC certificate must be held by the manufacturer or a designated representative.
a.zh: 不。韩国依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》要求锂二次电芯及电池组取得KC安全认证（안전인증），由KATS指定机构（如KTC、KTL或KTR）依据KC 62133（与IEC 62133一致）进行检测。仅凭GB 31241测试报告不足以进入韩国市场，且KC证书须由制造商或指定代表持有。
a.zht: 不。韓國依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》要求鋰二次電芯及電池組取得KC安全認證（안전인증），由KATS指定機構（如KTC、KTL或KTR）依據KC 62133（與IEC 62133一致）進行檢測。僅憑GB 31241測試報告不足以進入韓國市場，且KC證書須由製造商或指定代表持有。

q.en: What does South Korea's KC certification scheme require from lithium battery exporters?
q.zh: 韩国KC认证制度对锂电池出口商有哪些要求？
q.zht: 韓國KC認證制度對鋰電池出口商有哪些要求？

a.en: Under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act administered by KATS under MOTIE, lithium secondary cells and battery packs fall under mandatory KC Safety Certification (안전인증). This requires type testing to KC 62133 by a designated lab, an initial factory inspection in most cases, affixing the KC Mark, and periodic factory audits. Products with integrated electronics or wireless functions additionally require KC-EMC registration and, for radio, type approval via RRA, while chemical content is governed by K-REACH.
a.zh: 依据由MOTIE下属KATS管理的《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》，锂二次电芯及电池组属于强制性KC安全认证（안전인증）。须由指定实验室依据KC 62133进行型式检测，多数情形须进行初始工厂检查，粘贴KC标志并接受定期工厂审核。含集成电子或无线功能的产品还须进行KC-EMC登记，无线部分须经RRA取得型号核准，化学成分则受K-REACH约束。
a.zht: 依據由MOTIE下屬KATS管理的《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》，鋰二次電芯及電池組屬於強制性KC安全認證（안전인증）。須由指定實驗室依據KC 62133進行型式檢測，多數情形須進行初始工廠檢查，粘貼KC標誌並接受定期工廠審核。含整合電子或無線功能的產品還須進行KC-EMC登記，無線部分須經RRA取得型號核准，化學成分則受K-REACH約束。
